allow: Bash(pwsh -NoProfile -Command '$raw=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd\(\);$json=$raw|ConvertFrom-Json;$fp=$json.tool_input.file_path;if\($fp -and \($fp -match '\\''\(?i\)[\\\\\\/]\(Library|Temp|Obj|Logs|UserSettings\)[\\\\\\/]'\\'' -or $fp -match '\\''\(?i\)^\(Library|Temp|Obj|Logs|UserSettings\)[\\\\\\/]'\\''\)\){$out=[PSCustomObject]@{systemMessage='\\''GUARDRAIL: Unity-generated folder edit is forbidden. Path: '\\''+$fp};$out|ConvertTo-Json -Compress}')
